sentiment.reasoning: Securing a large $650M contract provides immediate revenue visibility and long-term operational stability.

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational event that typically has no material impact on financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
